steps.title: Slope of r, then negative reciprocal for perpendicular s
steps.content: Line $r$ through $(3, 14)$ and $(9, 15)$: slope $= \frac{15-14}{9-3} = \frac{1}{6}$. Perpendicular slope $= -\frac{1}{(1/6)} = -6$.

steps.title: Equation of line s through (2, 4) with slope −6
Scale to match ax + 7y = c
steps.content: Multiply $6x + y = 16$ by 7: $42x + 7y = 112$, so the requested value is $c = 112$. 112 is correct.
